feat.name: Transcendent Deflection
feat.requirement: You're wielding a one-handed, agile, or finesse melee weapon.
feat.text: You charge your weapon with spiritual energy and intercept the attack. The weapon becomes broken, and the target is unharmed by the attack. If you’re carrying another one-handed, agile, or finesse melee weapon, you can immediately Swap it for the broken weapon.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: An enemy within your reach would damage you or your ally with an attack.
